style=\"shape=hexagon;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;perimeter=hexagonPerimeter2;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#f0a500;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width=\"200\" height=\"50\" as=\"geometry\" /></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 200, "h": 50, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Development Action"}, {"xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\" id=\"1\" parent=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"has requirement\" style=\"edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#0050ef;\" edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint x=\"0\" y=\"30\" as=\"sourcePoint\" /><mxPoint x=\"160\" y=\"30\" as=\"targetPoint\"
